subject: status
body: Already done! Perched crows are coded and committed to index.html: ~10 crows on exposed ledges (rows 9-DEEP_R) using the glide frame as placeholder perch pose. They take off when approached (130px) or startled by roar. The code replaces the old structure. Moths and rats already existed. Ready for whatever's next — #47 SVG swap or anything else.
